agent_outputs.raw: The pilot design has three confounds that prevent causal attribution to the model. Self-selected large retailers are a different population than the broader merchant network. Concurrent authentication improvements in some pilot merchants provide an alternative fraud reduction mechanism. Approved-only label observability means fraud rate comparisons depend on approval rate policies that differed between groups. The same-calendar-week comparison controls for seasonality but not for these structural differences. Network expansion requires a randomized controlled test. Critique wins.

Merchant self-selection, concurrent authentication changes, and approved-only label bias are three independent reasons why the pilot result cannot be attributed to the model. Any one of these alone would require investigation. Together they make the causal inference unsalvageable without a properly controlled experiment. The pilot is suggestive but not sufficient for network-wide expansion. Critique wins.

The pilot cannot support the network-wide expansion recommendation because three confounds block causal inference: merchants self-selected and are not representative of the network, some pilot merchants also changed authentication during the pilot, and fraud labels are only observable for approved transactions with different approval policies across groups. A within-merchant randomized or switchback test with authentication held constant is the appropriate next step. Critique wins.

synthesis: Unanimous critique_wins. All three agents identify the same three confounds with consistent reasoning. The same-calendar-week matching is correctly noted as insufficient to control for the structural confounds.

etd_constraint.condition: Within comparable merchants or randomized traffic slices holding authentication settings constant; track consistent fraud and approval outcomes
etd_constraint.supports_critique_if: Fraud improvement shrinks materially after controlling for authentication changes and merchant characteristics
etd_constraint.supports_defense_if: Model shows significant fraud reduction in comparable stable-auth merchants vs. matched controls
etd_constraint.ambiguous_if: Some improvement attributable to model but magnitude smaller than pilot suggested
